## Tags
select, cursor

## Categories
arrows, design, cursors

## Source
[Lucide v1.14.0](https://lucide.dev/icons/lasso-select)

## Example
```rust
use dioxus::prelude::*;
use dioxus_icons::lucide::LassoSelect;

fn app() -> Element {
    rsx! {
        LassoSelect { size: 20, color: "red" }
    }
}
```
